title: Global In-Situ Chlorophyll & Turbidity Observations (Near-Real-Time)
abstract: Global near-real-time in-situ chlorophyll and turbidity (CPHL-TUR4) observations from autonomous platforms (floats, buoys), distributed via Copernicus Marine Service, covering the 2020-2021 period.

variables.name: CPHL
variables.label: Chlorophyll
variables.description: In-situ chlorophyll observation from an autonomous platform.

steward.name: Copernicus Marine Service (mirrored internally by KAUST)

access.how_to_request: Publicly downloadable from https://marine.copernicus.eu/ (INSITU_GLO_PHYBGCWAV_DISCRETE_MYNRT_013_030 product family).

known_issues: Global, not filtered to Red Sea — needs spatial subsetting to identify observations relevant to the basin.
Very large single file (16.4 GB) — likely needs chunked/streamed processing rather than a full in-memory load.
